string.text:
The Walther PPQ Q5 Match is a precision-engineered 9mm competition pistol known for its excellent ergonomics, crisp trigger, and accuracy. It likely found its way into the Zone through military or private contractor use, black market trade, or as part of experimental loadouts tested in the lawless and dangerous environment of the Zone.
 This particular model is chambered for .40 S&W.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] .40 S&W compatible suppressor
